content.summary: JSON parsing, serialization of TD types, and parameter round-trip utilities. Handles conversion between TD objects (Par, Cell, Channel, OP, Position, Vector, Color, Matrix) and JSON-safe values.
warnings: textToJSON and datToJSON return None on failure — they do NOT raise. Always null-check the result.
destroyOthers=True in loadChildrenFromJSONDict wipes all children not in the dict — use with extreme caution.

members.name: textToJSON
members.description: Parses a JSON string. Returns dict or None on failure (malformed JSON, empty text). Prints to textport but does NOT raise.

parameters.name: orderedDict
parameters.description: If True, use OrderedDict for object pairs

examples.code:
data = TDJSON.textToJSON(op('config').text)
if data is None:
    debug('Failed to parse config JSON')
    return
examples.label: Always null-check the result

warnings: Returns None on failure — never assume the result is a dict

members.name: datToJSON
members.description: Parses a DAT's text content as JSON. Returns dict or None on failure.

parameters.name: dat
parameters.description: DAT operator whose text to parse

parameters.name: orderedDict
parameters.description: If True, use OrderedDict for object pairs

warnings: Returns None on failure — never assume the result is a dict

members.name: serializeTDData
members.description: Recursively converts TD types to JSON-safe values. Par→eval(), Cell→val, Channel→eval(), OP→path string, Position/Vector→[x,y,z], Color→[r,g,b,a], Matrix→nested 4x4 list, dict/list→recurse.

parameters.name: data
parameters.description: TD data to serialize (can be nested dict/list of TD types)

examples.label: Serialize mixed TD data for JSON

members.name: parameterToJSONPar
members.description: Exports a single parameter to a dict describing its name, type, default, range, menu items, etc. Use with addParameterFromJSONDict for round-trip.

members.name: addParameterFromJSONDict
members.description: Creates or updates a custom parameter from a dict produced by parameterToJSONPar.

parameters.name: setValues
parameters.description: If True, apply parameter values from dict

parameters.name: page
parameters.description: Page name to add parameter to
